description: Psychiatry and mental health vocabulary. Covers therapy session documentation and the Clinical Global Impression — Severity scale (CGI-S), which is the most widely used psychiatrist-rated global severity instrument. Mental health diagnoses (ICD-10 F-codes, SNOMED 74732009 descendants) are already covered via CIEL SAME-AS mappings in concept_reference_maps. A comprehensive set of standardised psychiatric assessment instruments (PHQ-9, GAD-7, AUDIT, DAST, CAGE, PANSS) requires Tabibu-authored ConvSets — tracked as Path B curation work.

notes.167693: Session attended (ConvSet) — therapy session type and attendance tracking construct covering session type (individual/group/family therapy), attendance status, session frequency, and provider type (~10 concepts)
notes.167800: Clinical Global Impression — Severity (CGI-S) set (ConvSet) — 7-point psychiatrist-rated symptom severity scale: Not assessed, Normal, Borderline ill, Mildly ill, Moderately ill, Markedly ill, Severely ill, Extremely ill (~8 concepts)
